hero.headline: A unified portal for all Delta schools
hero.deck: The Delta Schools platform bridges the gap between disparate platforms, providing a high-performance entry point for DAS, DILS, and DMLS schools.

ecosystem.title: Integrated Ecosystem
ecosystem.deck: It combines modern learning tools and standard methods to ensure a high level of education for your children.

das.label: DAS
das.body: Delta American School is an international school accredited by Cognia in Mansoura, Egypt. We offer an American curriculum from kindergarten through grade 12. We have been developing future leaders since 2011.

dils.label: DILS
dils.body: Delta International Schools in Mansoura offers the internationally accredited international education system (American Diploma) instead of the Egyptian curriculum, and qualifies students for international university entrance exams.

dmls.label: DMLS
dmls.body: Delta Modern Language School is a private school (in Mansoura) that provides (national) language education from kindergarten to secondary school, and integrates the Ministry's curricula in English with activities and building the student's personality.

governance.title: Unified Governance
governance.body: We guarantee you every comfort and convenience in the process of enrolling your child in one of our schools.
governance.check1: Explore all schools and choose what you want for your child
governance.check2: Excellent communication service throughout the week
governance.check3: Apply for your child from home

cta.headline: Are you ready to enroll your children in Delta schools?
cta.deck: We provide your children with the best modern learning tools to ensure their educational level, in order to build the future generation.
